# Twist Parties

> Vancouver-area balloon twisting specialists and a colourful party entertainment collective. We create custom balloon art, premium balloon decor, and connect clients with party add-ons for birthdays, schools, festivals, corporate picnics and family events across Metro Vancouver and the Fraser Valley.

## Services
- Balloon twisting (our specialty): custom balloons made on-site from a guest balloon menu. ~15 detailed balloons per hour, or 20–30 simpler designs. From $200 + travel for one hour (best for up to 15 children). Multiple balloon artists available for large events. Public events, schools and corporate picnics: 2-hour minimum.
- Balloon decor: custom balloon walls, arches, columns, organic garlands, photo frames, foils and flowers. Biodegradable latex. Priced by quote, subject to availability. Send inspiration photos to start.
- Party add-ons (by request / partner network): face painting, mascot and costume characters, extra balloon artists, balloon candy cups, mini twisting lessons and party favours.

## Service areas
Vancouver, Delta, Surrey, Tsawwassen, Burnaby, Langley, Abbotsford, West Vancouver, North Vancouver, Maple Ridge, Pitt Meadows, Port Coquitlam, Coquitlam, New Westminster, Mission, Agassiz, Chilliwack, Squamish, Whistler, Pemberton (all BC).

## Booking
Contact via the website form or WhatsApp with your event date, time, location and guest count. We confirm availability, travel and the best package — usually within 24 hours. A deposit secures your date.

## Contact
- Website: https://www.twistparties.ca/
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/twistparties
- Email: hello@twistparties.ca
